revision.comment: [[Commons:Rollback|Reverted]] edits by [[Special:Contributions/Monarose2395|Monarose2395]] ([[User talk:Monarose2395|talk]]) to last revision by DieBuche
revision.text: {{{1}}} ---- The actual code is hidden but it looks like: {{{1}}} This template allows easy switching to Unicode fonts for pages that require Unicode to display correctly. On some browsers, such as IE6, Unicode does not seem to be activated automatically, so this template lets you force it manually. (class="Unicode" is defined in [[MediaWiki:Common.css]].) '''Examples:''' {{unicode|⋊}} and {{unicode|⋉}} give {{unicode|⋊}} (instead of ⋊) and {{unicode|⋉}} (instead of ⋉). [[Category:Formatting templates|{{PAGENAME}}]] [[Category:Typing-aid templates|{{PAGENAME}}]]

revision.comment: 1 revision imported: importing visual file changer

On some browsers, such as IE6, Unicode does not seem to be activated automatically, so this template lets you force it manually. (class="Unicode" is defined in [[MediaWiki:Common.css]].) '''Examples:''' {{unicode|⋊}} and {{unicode|⋉}} give {{unicode|⋊}} (instead of ⋊) and {{unicode|⋉}} (instead of ⋉). revision.comment: imported only latest revision from https://archive.org/details/miraheze-wiki-shintowiki-20251218 to avoid excessive disk usage, comment on the revision was Text replacement - "↵<noinclude>[[Category:Templates without wikidata]]</noinclude>" to ""

revision.text: {{{1}}} ---- The actual code is hidden but it looks like: {{{1}}} This template allows easy switching to Unicode fonts for pages that require Unicode to display correctly. On some browsers, such as IE6, Unicode does not seem to be activated automatically, so this template lets you force it manually. (class="Unicode" is defined in [[MediaWiki:Common.css]].)
